introSection: Diving coaster “Vanish!” (Japanese: ダイビングコースター「バニッシュ！」) is a steel roller coaster located at Yokohama Cosmoworld in Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster has a drop into an underwater tunnel and a helix.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Light pink track and white supports.

sections.title: External links

fullText:
Diving coaster “Vanish!” (Japanese: ダイビングコースター「バニッシュ！」) is a steel roller coaster located at Yokohama Cosmoworld in Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan.

This roller coaster has a drop into an underwater tunnel and a helix.

Light pink track and white supports.






 * Diving coaster “Vanish!” on the park's website
